requirements: R1: leads_to(tree, 'collect personal data', 'send email notification')
R3: leads_to(tree, 'check customer bank privilege', 'check credit worthiness')
R4: precedence(tree, 'determine loan risk level', 'check customer bank privilege')
R5: precedence(tree, 'determine loan risk level', 'check credit worthiness')
R6: executed_by(tree, 'check customer bank privilege', 'credit broker') or executed_by(tree, 'check customer bank privilege', 'supervisor')
R8: executed_by_return(tree, 'check customer bank privilege') != executed_by_return(tree, 'check credit worthiness')
R9: executed_by(tree, 'check risk acceptability', 'branch office manager')
R12: leads_to(tree, 'check risk acceptability', 'approve request') or leads_to(tree, 'check risk acceptability', 'reject request')
R15: max_time_between(tree, 'sign loan contract', 'close loan contract offer', '7 working days')
R18: condition_directly_follows(tree, '(loanRequestCredit > 1000000) and (checkCreditWorthinessPerformed == false)', 'create suspense file')
